title: Geriatric Dentistry - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Geriatric Dentistry 7 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a dental clinic four times per year, in partnership with the University of Washington Dental School. Services include screenings, fillings, removal of teeth, and treatment of infection. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: -Medicaid-eligible children over the age of 6 and their parents -Low-income veterans without dental coverage -Ages 60 and older who are low-income and without dental coverage Hours: Clinics are held four times per year Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTH OFFICES HEALTHCARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, radiology, optometry, mental health, and lab services. Also offers medical care related to domestic violence and sexual assault. 200 Gwee-Shut Road Siletz, OR 97380 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and the general public. Dental care for tribal members only. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DENTAL LIFELINE NETWORK DONATED DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental services to older adults, people with disabilities, and medically fragile individuals through a network of volunteer dentists and dental labs. A volunteer dentist will come up with a treatment plan, with the goal of making sure the patient is pain-free and able to eat properly. Does not provide emergency care. Services may include: -Dental cleanings -Cavity prevention (sealants, fluoride treatments/supplements) -Dental prosthodontics (dentures, bridges, crowns, implants) -Orthodontics -Endodontics -Dental restoration -Periodontics -Oral/maxillofacial surgery -Cosmetic dentistry 1800 15th Street Suite 100 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: Veterans and individuals who cannot pay for dental care and who are age 65 and older, have a permanent disability, or are medically compromised. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (503) 594-0837 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP VANCOUVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general dental care such as diagnostic, preventive, restorative, oral surgery, endodontic, fixed, and removable prosthetics. Also can deliver dental treatment to non-ambulatory patients in care facilities and private homes. 16500 SE 15th Street Suite 150 Vancouver, WA 98683 Eligibility: Age 55 and older or any age who are homebound or in need of a wheelchair-accessible clinic Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (360) 326-3829 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE EMMETT DENTAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary dental care services. 1020 E. Locust Avenue Emmett, ID 83617 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-1pm and 1:30pm-6pm (208) 365-5064 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE NYSSA DENTAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary dental care services. 17 N 6th Street Nyssa, OR 97913 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Wednesday 8am-6:30pm Thursday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 372-2606 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE PAYETTE DENTAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary dental care services. 1501 NE 10th Avenue Payette, ID 83661 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-4:45pm, Tuesday 8am-6:45pm, Friday 8am-1pm Toothache Clinic: 2 Fridays per month, call for information Email (208) 642-9379 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF SILETZ INDIANS HEALTHCARE SERVICES VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE DENTAL CARE
